title: Supplementary materials for "Relative Information Gain: Shannon entropy-based measure of the relative structural conservation in RNA alignments"
author: Pietrosanto, Marco
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary materials for "Relative Information Gain: Shannon entropy-based measure of the relative structural conservation in RNA alignments". These include precalculated RNA Blocks, MBRs (Matrix of Bear encoded RNA), sPSSMs (structural Position Specific Scoring Matrix), RIG (Relative Information Gain) scores, and plots calculated for 3016 Rfam 14.1 families. In particular: 

 
	  alignments.zip:  zipped file containing the structural alignments for each Rfam family. 
	  RNA_Blocks.zip : zipped file containing the RNA blocks used to derive different substitution matrices. 
	  MBRs.zip : zipped file containing the substitution matrices. 
	  sPSSMs.zip : zipped file containing the structural Position Specific Scoring Matrices. 
	  RIGs.zip : zipped file containing the RIG scores. 
	  entropy.zip : zipped file containing the (rescaled) entropy. 
	  plots.zip : zipped file containing the plots.  
 

 All the scripts to build all these files are available at  https://github.com/helmercitterich-lab/RIG .
